query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_guides,
  SUM(CASE WHEN overview IS NOT NULL AND overview != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_overview,
  SUM(CASE WHEN topThingsToDo IS NOT NULL AND topThingsToDo != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_activities,
  SUM(CASE WHEN nearbyAirports IS NOT NULL AND nearbyAirports != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_airports,
  SUM(CASE WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_coordinates,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bestTimeToVisit IS NOT NULL AND bestTimeToVisit != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_best_time,
  SUM(CASE WHEN faqSections IS NOT NULL AND faqSections != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_faq,
  SUM(CASE WHEN attractions IS NOT NULL AND attractions != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_attractions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN beachesLocalRules IS NOT NULL AND beachesLocalRules != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_beaches_rules
FROM island_guides
